name: Traeger, Inc.
business: Traeger is the creator and category leader of the wood pellet grill, an outdoor cooking system that ignites all-natural hardwoods to grill, smoke, bake, roast, braise, and barbecue. The company sells wood pellet grills, consumables (wood pellets, rubs, sauces), and accessories through retail partners and direct-to-consumer channels, though it is exiting the Traeger direct-to-consumer business as part of Project Gravity. Its products are sold to end consumers via retailers such as Ace Hardware, The Home Depot, Amazon, Best Buy, and Costco.

exposures.sentence: Our flagship wood pellet grills are internet of things ( IoT ) devices that allow owners to program, monitor, and control their grill through our Traeger app, which engaged 2.8 million active users for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025.

catalysts.sentence: We recorded $24.9 million of total restructuring and other costs related to these actions in fiscal year 2025 and expect the program to be substantially completed by the end of fiscal year 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market of 78 million U.S. households that own a grill, with Traeger household penetration of 3.4%.
tamClaims.sentence: Today, we estimate that 78 million households in the United States own a grill, representing the total addressable market.

tamClaims.claim: Traeger's U.S. household penetration is 3.4% of the total addressable market.
tamClaims.sentence: With approximately 2.7 million Traeger grills sold in the United States from 2020 to 2025, we estimate that our U.S. household penetration is only 3.4% of this total addressable market.
